---
title: "new_lesson"
author: "dalej"
date: "2026-02-02"
output: html_document
params:
  data: "Hawaii"
---

```{r message=TRUE, warning=TRUE, paged.print=TRUE}
# This is just some R code
x <- 1:5
mean(x)
```

```{r}
plot(1:5)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
print(params$data)

```

## Bash output

```{bash}
echo "params$data"
ls -al ./
```

## Python output

```{python}
x = "Hello rmd world"
print(x.split(' '))

```




## R markdown makes it easy to insert formating text like:
  
  - *italics*
  - **bold**
  - `code blocks`
  - ect

Also use latex to make equations: $E = mc^{2}$
